description: CompositionBlack jersey made of 100% polyester, has a mock collar, half zipper opening, short sleeves, Pune Warriors logo on the left chest and ADIDAS logo on the right chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironCrank up your style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer with this Pune Warriors Match Jersey from ADIDAS. You'll be displaying Pune pride with this jersey as you cheer your team at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Warriors!' than with this jersey!
